description: Wind Power LLC needs to route today's deliveries. There are two outgoing shipments (Delivery Notes) heading to customers 'Chi-Chis' and 'Consumers and Consumers Express'. Your job is to create a single Delivery Trip that combines these two Delivery Notes, assigning it to driver 'Alex Driver' and vehicle 'WP-TRK-01'. After dispatching the trip, you must record the physical execution of the trip by creating a Vehicle Log for 'WP-TRK-01'. Update its odometer to exactly 15120 (representing a 120-mile trip) and log a fuel expense totaling exactly $60.00 (use the Fuel Qty and Price fields to equal $60). Submit both the Delivery Trip and the Vehicle Log. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
